case_title: STEPHEN C HATCH VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF HATCH, STEPHEN C

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HATCH, STEPHEN C RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $7,008.51 PRINCIPAL, $32.84 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,221.35, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
